title: Global oil stockpiles could hit record lows if Strait of Hormuz remains closed
summary_full: The world's oil stockpiles could approach all-time lows by the end of May due to the Strait of Hormuz closure, according to UBS.
summary_public: The world's oil stockpiles could approach all-time lows by the end of May due to the Strait of Hormuz closure, according to UBS.
